information.title: Bayanan martaba
information.description: Sabunta yadda kake bayyana a duk faɗin MoolaHub.

picture.title: Hoton martaba
picture.hint: PNG ko JPG, mai murabba'i ya fi dacewa.

errors.nameEmpty: Suna ba zai iya zama fanko ba.
errors.savePicture: An kasa ajiye hoton bayanin martaba.
errors.chooseImage: Da fatan za a zaɓi fayil ɗin hoto.

security.title: Shiga da tsaro
security.description: Ƙara ƙarin matakan kariya ga asusunka.

changePassword.title: Kalmar sirri
changePassword.descriptionChange: Canza kalmar sirrin da kake amfani wajen shiga
changePassword.descriptionSet: Saita kalmar sirri don shiga da imel ɗinka
changePassword.needVerifiedEmail: Ana buƙatar imel da aka tabbatar don saita kalmar sirri.
changePassword.sendCodeIntro: Za mu aika lambar tantancewa zuwa {{email}} don tabbatar da kai ne kafin saita kalmar sirri.
changePassword.checkEmail: Duba imel ɗinka don lamba mai lamba 6.

errors.minLength: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 8.
errors.mismatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba.
errors.enterTotp: Shigar da lambar tantancewa mai matakai biyu don ci gaba.
errors.sendCode: An kasa aika lamba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
errors.invalidCode: Wannan lambar ba ta da inganci ko ta ƙare.

deactivate.label: Kashe asusu
deactivate.detail: Kashe na ɗan lokaci. Sake shiga a kowane lokaci don dawo da shi.
deactivate.dialogDescription: Za a kashe asusunka na ɗan lokaci kuma za a fitar da kai. Bayananka, ma'aunanka, da tanadin ƙungiya za su kasance lafiya. Sake shiga a kowane lokaci don sake kunna shi.

delete.label: Share asusu
delete.detail: Cire asusunka da bayananka har abada
delete.dialogDescription: Wannan yana cire bayanin martabarka har abada kuma yana janye damar shiga. Za ka iya share kawai lokacin da ma'aunanka ya kai sifili kuma ba ka da wani tanadi na kanka ko na ƙungiya mai aiki. Rubuta DELETE don tabbatarwa.

passkeys.title: Maɓallan shiga
passkeys.description: Shiga da Face ID, Touch ID, ko maɓallin tsaro
passkeys.unsupported: Wannan mai binciken yanar gizo ba ya goyon bayan maɓallan shiga.
passkeys.empty: Babu maɓallan shiga tukuna. Ƙara ɗaya don shiga cikin sauri da aminci.

errors.add: Ba mu iya ƙara wannan maɓallin shiga ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
errors.remove: Ba mu iya cire wannan maɓallin shiga ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

backupCodes.title: Ajiye lambobin ajiyarka
backupCodes.description: Kowace lamba tana aiki sau ɗaya. Ajiye su a wuri mai aminci. Suna ba ka damar shiga idan ka rasa mai tantancewarka.

twoFactor.title: Manhajar tantancewa
twoFactor.description: Buƙatar lamba mai lamba 6 lokacin shiga don ƙarin tsaro

setup.instructions: Skani wannan lambar QR da Google Authenticator, 1Password, ko kowace manhajar TOTP, sannan shigar da lamba mai lamba 6 da take nunawa.

regenerateForm.instructions: Shigar da lamba ta yanzu ko lambar ajiya don ƙera sabon saiti. Tsofaffin lambobin ajiyarka za su daina aiki.

disableForm.instructions: Shigar da lamba ta yanzu ko lambar ajiya don kashe 2FA.

errors.codeFailed: Wannan lambar ba ta yi aiki ba. Sake gwadawa.

stepUp.title: Tabbatar da kai ne
stepUp.descBoth: Shigar da kalmar sirrinka da lambar tantancewa mai matakai biyu don ci gaba.
stepUp.descPassword: Shigar da kalmar sirrinka don ci gaba.
stepUp.descTotp: Shigar da lambar tantancewa mai matakai biyu don ci gaba.
stepUp.descEmail: Za mu aiko maka lamba ta amfani sau ɗaya ta imel don tabbatar da wannan canjin.

errors.sendCode: An kasa aika lamba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
errors.enterEmailCode: Da fatan za a shigar da lambar da muka aiko maka ta imel.
errors.enterPassword: Da fatan za a shigar da kalmar sirrinka don ci gaba.
errors.enterTotp: Da fatan za a shigar da lambar tantancewa mai matakai biyu don ci gaba.

imageUpload.defaultHint: Ƙara hoto don ci gaba da rayar da mafarki.
